skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered short video creation agent for product ads, social media content, and brand videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 492 potential issues, but evaluation determined all are false positives. The skill uses standard shell scripting patterns (command substitution, temp files) for legitimate CLI operations. Network access is limited to the Pexo API endpoint (https://pexo.ai). Environment variable access is for API authentication (PEXO_API_KEY) required for the service. No malicious behavior, data exfiltration, or harmful operations detected.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Execution Patterns
medium_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged shell command substitution and backtick execution in scripts. These are standard shell scripting patterns (mktemp, command substitution) used by legitimate CLI tools. No user input is dynamically executed as commands.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Command substitution patterns are standard shell practices for CLI tools. No evidence of user input being dynamically executed as shell commands.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
low_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY from environment or config file. This is required for API authentication and is standard practice for CLI tools.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key access is for authentication with the Pexo service, a legitimate and necessary operation.

low_findings.title: Network Access to Pexo API Endpoint
low_findings.description: Hardcoded URLs reference the legitimate Pexo API endpoint (https://pexo.ai). Network access is required for video generation service.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network access is limited to the legitimate Pexo API service endpoint, not arbitrary external destinations.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access for Configuration
low_findings.description: Access to ~/.pexo/config and ~/.pexo/tmp for configuration and temporary file storage. Standard CLI tool patterns.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file and temp directory access are standard practices for CLI tools with no security concerns.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Content creators and marketers need to produce engaging video content quickly but lack video production skills. The Pexo Agent skill enables Claude to act as a video production assistant, handling scriptwriting, shot composition, and video generation through the Pexo AI platform.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Create product advertisements, brand videos, and social media content
Upload and incorporate user-provided images, videos, and audio into productions
Handle multi-step video production workflows with preview and revision cycles
Poll and retrieve completed videos from the Pexo AI platform
limitations: Requires a valid PEXO_API_KEY from pexo.ai to function
Cannot generate videos offline; requires internet connection to Pexo API
Cannot crawl web URLs; user must upload files directly
Video generation time varies (15-20+ minutes for complex productions)

use_cases.title: Quick social media videos
use_cases.description: Marketing teams need to create quick social media content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. Provide a product description and assets, and the skill generates a polished video ready for posting.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Product showcase videos
use_cases.description: E-commerce sellers want product demonstration videos. Upload product images or videos, describe the key features, and receive a professional product showcase video.

use_cases.title: Brand explainer content
use_cases.description: Small businesses need explainer videos for their brand. Provide brand guidelines, key messages, and reference materials to generate brand-aligned explainer content.
use_cases.target_user: Small business owners and brand managers

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 30-second product video for my new wireless headphones.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner user wanting a basic promotional video

prompt_templates.title: Video with uploaded assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Here is the product photo <original-image>uploaded_asset_id</original-image>. Make a 15-second Instagram Reel showing the product in use.
prompt_templates.scenario: User with product images wanting platform-specific content

prompt_templates.title: Revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: The video is good but can you make the transitions smoother and add more upbeat music?
prompt_templates.scenario: User requesting modifications to an existing video

prompt_templates.title: Multi-video campaign
prompt_templates.prompt: Create three short videos for our summer sale campaign: a teaser (10s), main ad (30s), and a story version (15s). Product images are attached.
prompt_templates.scenario: User managing a multi-video marketing campaign

output_examples.input: Make a 20-second product video for my handmade jewelry brand
output_examples.output:
Your request has been submitted to Pexo. Estimated completion: 15-20 minutes. Track progress at: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_xxx

When ready, you'll receive the video download link and preview options.

output_examples.input: I uploaded a shoe image. Create a TikTok-style video showing the shoe being worn
output_examples.output:
Asset uploaded successfully. Your request has been sent to Pexo with your product image. Pexo may ask clarifying questions about the video style, target audience, or specific shots you'd like.

Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_yyy

output_examples.input: Can you show me a preview of the video before finalizing?
output_examples.output:
Pexo is generating preview options for you. Please wait a moment while the previews are prepared.

You'll receive several options (A, B, C...) to choose from before the final video is produced.

best_practices: Be specific about video duration and platform target (TikTok vs YouTube Shorts)
Upload high-quality source images or videos for better output quality
Let Pexo handle creative decisions; provide the brief rather than detailed instructions
anti_patterns: Do not specify technical parameters like codec, bitrate, or resolution
Do not add duration or style descriptions the user did not mention
Do not poll the chat endpoint while waiting; only poll project status

faq.question: How do I get started with the Pexo skill?
faq.answer: You need a PEXO_API_KEY from pexo.ai. Create a config file at ~/.pexo/config with your API key and base URL. Run pexo-doctor.sh to verify your setup.

faq.question: What video formats and lengths are supported?
faq.answer: Videos can be 5-120 seconds with aspect ratios of 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Reels), or 1:1 (Instagram feed).

faq.question: Can I upload my own images or videos?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the pexo-upload.sh script to upload images (jpg, png, webp), videos (mp4, mov), or audio (mp3, wav) to include in your production.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Simple 15-second videos take 15-20 minutes. Complex or longer videos may take longer. The skill polls for completion and notifies you when ready.

faq.question: Can I request revisions to a video?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project ID and send your feedback through the chat interface. Pexo will generate a new version based on your input.

faq.question: What happens if video generation fails?
faq.answer: The skill will report the error with a nextActionHint explaining what went wrong. Common issues include API key problems, daily limits, or project conflicts. You can retry after addressing the issue.
